title: CF_DocCentralV3_LogEvent — Response Schema
description: Output returned by CF_DocCentralV3_LogEvent to the calling flow or Canvas App. The flow always returns a structured response — it never throws an unhandled exception to the caller.

oneOf.title: Success response
oneOf.description: Returned when the AuditLog item was successfully created.

auditLogItemId.description: SharePoint item ID of the newly created AuditLog record.

correlationId.description: The correlation ID used for this log entry (either the input value or a newly generated GUID).

oneOf.title: Failure response
oneOf.description: Returned when the AuditLog write failed. The calling flow must treat this as non-fatal — it must continue its primary operation even if logging fails.

correlationId.description: The correlation ID, if it was resolved before the failure.

callerGuidance.description: How calling flows must handle this response.
rules: Do NOT throw or terminate the parent flow if success = false.
Log the failure locally if possible (e.g. store in a variable for the run record).
Continue the primary operation regardless of the logging outcome.
Never call CF_DocCentralV3_LogEvent from within its own Catch scope — this would cause an infinite loop.
If auditLogItemId is needed for correlation, store it in a flow variable after a successful call.

powerAutomateOutputDefinition.description: Output parameters to define in the Respond to a PowerApp or flow action.

outputs.name: success
outputs.description: True if the log entry was created, false if the write failed.

outputs.name: auditLogItemId
outputs.description: SharePoint item ID of the created AuditLog record. 0 on failure.

outputs.name: correlationId
outputs.description: Correlation ID used for this entry.

outputs.name: message
outputs.description: Error message on failure. Empty string on success.
